title: gossypium hirsutum f. palmeri
intro: Gossypium hirsutum f. palmeri, also known as Palmer's cotton, is a subspecies of cotton plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Palmer's cotton can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create a medicinal tea or salve.
